nasb.text: and the custom of the priests with the people. When any man was offering a sacrifice, the priest’s servant would come while the meat was boiling, with a three-pronged fork in his hand.

esv.text: The custom of the priests with the people was that when any man offered sacrifice, the priest’s servant would come, while the meat was boiling, with a three-pronged fork in his hand,

cnv.text: 也不理會當時祭司待人民的規矩。凡是有人獻祭，在煮肉的時候，祭司的僕人就來，手裡拿著三齒的叉，

ccb.text: 对民众不守自己做祭司的职分。每当民众来献祭，还在煮祭肉的时候，他们的仆人便拿着三齿叉来，
